item.title: A minisatisfying dump
item.description:
Hydraulic press crushing toilet paper
Pinnal that's stuck
That's really satisfying
Car detailing level 3000
Sauce: https://dolcecara.com/collections/steel-warcraft-3d-metal-puzzle
Oddly satisfying (with sound)
Satisfying thatching
Food maniacs at work

item.dc:creator: UnclePetey1987

item.title: Co-parenting
item.description:
Pepa (orange) and Julietta are my foster cats. They gave birth about a week apart.
Pepa has 6 orange kittens and Julietta had 2- one orange and one black tabby.
All baby is their baby, tho.
They love both their mommy.
Julietta didn’t want to be a mom at first. Pepa took care of her two while she figured things out and now she’s doing great.
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Make sure to film the police
item.description: I’m happy that the other cops did the right thing. #police #misconduct #letshopeforaccountability Edit: Thanks to @sambaah05 for sauce. He's a security guard, not a police officer it seems. https://www.nbcchicago.com/news/local/harvey-police-arrest-security-guard-in-video-that-goes-viral/2402429/
item.dc:creator: clashatdemonhed

item.title: True Superheroes
item.description: Lest we forget what we almost lost. “Here are the women, Senate aides, who had the presence of mind and courage to protect, keep safe, and transport the electoral votes before fleeing the Senate, which was under siege by domestic terrorists. There will always be villains. There will always be heroes.” @glenndoyle
item.dc:creator: 103Brewer

item.description: Source: matt bernstein (@mattxiv) https://www.instagram.com/mattxiv/?hl=en
item.dc:creator: BootsDusty

item.title: The dog from this comic, passed away
item.description: Wanna know something crazy? I’m not even a dog person and I’m crying from reading this. I’m a grown man and I’m crying my eyes out. It wasn’t even my dog! Lol. But I lost my bunny last year and it still hurts. These furry little friends of ours are lights in a cold, dark, and indifferent world. They come into our lives as suddenly as they leave, and we never really know how much we loved them until they’re gone. We think they depend on us, but the truth is we depend on them. So in memory of “Rambo”, and of my own little bunny rabbit “Fluffy G”, please give your pets a big ol hug tonight. They deserve it.
item.dc:creator: TheJokerXX

item.title: Blind doggo reacts to finding a puddle
item.dc:creator: Grumpywitch

item.description:
THUUUUUURSDAY
I am "the age of the tortoise that one guy on the internet has at work".... new response.
I have been so wrong. About so many things.
Paige yes!
Pretty
Me tomorrow while pushing to make sure things are organized before the weekend, "it's Friday. I'm taking it easy!" ***Most Viral Song Edit*** https://open.spotify.com/track/6GeiA9XxITMHM3jk1hkNjY?si=p4BQ3RTfRkWUi3jI3JKuNg&utm_source=copy-link Thanks guys!!! Send music???

item.dc:creator: CaveHunter3000

item.title: Just made my childhood dream come true
item.description: This post will most likely die in the user sub, and this is prob not a big deal to most people. But I always dreamed to score a corner kick since I was little. It took me 1h of practice to get this perfect shot. Edited: Wow, woke up in the morning to find out this made FB, thank everyone for the kind and supportive words. I know it's not that impressive because it's just an empty goal, as some of you pointed out, but for someone who just played soccer for less than a year, this was quite an achievement for me. I'll keep training and score in a match one day. Cheer :)
item.dc:creator: Tientchik

item.title: Lost my first 20 lbs. Couldn't tell until I took a pic❤️
item.description: 30/5'7/227 lbs first pic 207 lbs second pic goal 160 lbs. Just some good ole calorie counting and walking on the treadmill 1 hour a day 4 days a week?
item.dc:creator: myingenioususername
